reviews.comment:
Nafta y algo para comer al paso.

Cuidado que en Córdoba la nafta tiene un impuesto extra!
generalmente no les funciona la tarjeta Serviclub.

(Translated by Google)
Gas and a quick bite to eat.

Be careful, gas in Córdoba has an extra tax!

Serviclub cards usually don't work there.
